# LibraryPlaylistCreationRequest.Relationships.Tracks

**Object**

The songs and music videos to add to the created playlist’s tracklist.

## Declaration

```swift
object LibraryPlaylistCreationRequest.Relationships.Tracks
```

## Related Objects

- **LibraryPlaylistCreationRequest.Relationships.Tracks.Data**: Data of the tracks too add to the created library playlist.

## Related Objects

- **LibraryPlaylistCreationRequest.Relationships.Parent**: Library playlist folder which contains the playlist that the user creates.
